name: Characters & Orthogonality
description: χ(g)=tr ρ(g). Class functions. Orthogonality: ⟨χᵢ,χⱼ⟩=δᵢⱼ. Character determines rep. Character table. Decomposition formula.
mermaid:
graph TD
    D1["Def: Character\nχg = tr ρg"]
    D2["Def: Class function\nconst on conj classes"]
    D3["Def: Inner product\n⟨f,g⟩=Σ fḡ/|G|"]
    D4["Def: Character table\nχᵢ on Cⱼ"]
    T1["Thm: Orthogonality\n⟨χᵢ,χⱼ⟩=δᵢⱼ"]
    T2["Thm: χ determines ρ\nup to equiv"]
    T3["Thm: Decomposition\nmᵢ=⟨χ,χᵢ⟩"]
    T4["Thm: Row orthogonality\nΣⱼ |Cⱼ|χᵢχⱼ̄=δᵢⱼ|G|"]
    T5["Thm: |G|=Σ dᵢ²"]
    D1 --> D2
    D2 --> D3
    D3 --> T1
    D1 --> D4
    T1 --> T3
    T1 --> T4
    T2 --> T3
    T3 --> T5
    classDef definition fill:#b197fc,color:#fff
    classDef theorem fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    class D1,D2,D3,D4 definition
    class T1,T2,T3,T4,T5 theorem
